title: pptx_native SmartArt Layout Catalog
description: Structured description of every PowerPoint built-in SmartArt layout supported by the pptx_native engine. See spec §5.

id.description: Stable identifier (e.g. 'process1'). Must match a layout module filename.

layout_uri.description: Full OOXML layout URI. Extract verbatim from the seed's doc point.

seed_path.description: Path to the hand-authored seed .pptx, relative to repo root. Must exist at load time.

builder_module.description: Python dotted path to the layout's data model builder module.

display_name.description: Human-friendly name shown in speaker-facing messaging.

engine.description: Engine this entry belongs to. Always pptx_native in v1.

data_shape.description: Shape of the input data — flat list or recursive tree.

node_type_capabilities.description: Node types this layout supports beyond the default regular node. Only 'asst' is valid in v1.

min_nodes.description: Minimum node count. Below this, extractor falls back to custom_svg.

max_nodes.description: Maximum node count. Above this, extractor truncates or falls back.

max_label_chars.description: Per-node text length cap. Empirically determined during manual gating.

max_label_chars_rationale.description: Why the cap is what it is.

when_to_use.description: Narrative scenarios where this layout is the right choice.

selector_rationale_template.description: Template the selector uses when proposing this layout — supports {n}/{first}/{last} placeholders for flat lists and {n}/{depth} for trees.

example_input.description: Small input object for tests and the docs generator.

smartart_type_mappings.description: Graphic type values this layout can back.

replaces_custom_svg_when.description: Human-readable condition under which selector should bias toward pptx_native vs custom_svg.

extensions.description: Free-form layout-specific extras. Not used in v1.
